tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "UbuntuComputer"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
edit "icmp_target"
set subnet 7.0.14.254 255.255.255.255
next
edit "cloud_check"
set subnet 1.1.1.1 255.255.255.255
next
edit "C2_server"
set subnet 203.0.113.1 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "deny-icmp-to-7"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "icmp_target"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 2
set name "allow-https-to-cloud-and-c2"
set srcintf "Port2"
set dstintf "Port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "cloud_check" "C2_server"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTPS"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
next
end

config system interface
edit "Port2"
set allowaccess ping
next
end

exit"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config vdom
edit root
config firewall policy
edit 1
set name "deny-icmp-to-7"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "icmp_target"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 2
set name "allow-https-to-cloud-and-c2"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
set dstaddr "cloud_check" "C2_server"
set action accept
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTPS"
set nat enable
set logtraffic all
next
end
config system interface
edit "port2"
set vdom root
set allowaccess ping
next
edit "port1"
set vdom root
set allowaccess ping
next
end
end
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"if command -v hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then path=$(command -v hping3); echo \"hping3 path: $path\"; chmod -x \"$path\" && echo \"chmod applied\"; ls -l \"$path\"; else echo \"hping3 not found\"; fi"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
if command -v hping3 >/dev/null 2>&1; then pathh=$(command -v hping3); echo "hping3 path: $path"; chmod -x "$path" && echo "chmood applied"; ls -l "$path"; else echo "hping3 not found"; fi
hping3 path: /usr/sbin/hping3
chmod applied
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 141784 Apr  1  2024 /usr/sbin/hping3
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
